rule_metadata.name: p0f
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'p0f' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule p0f
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'p0f' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "p0f"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\/tmp\/p0f\.log/
		$string2 = "install p0f" nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = /p0f\s\-i\seth.{0,1000}\s\-p/ nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = /p0f\/p0f\.fp/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
